name: Buffalo County Fairgrounds
description: Buffalo County Fairgrounds is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kearney, NE. There are 10 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water.

name: Harvey Park Outdoor Pickleball Courts
description: Harvey Park Outdoor Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Kearney, NE. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include water.

name: Kearney SportsPlex
description: Kearney SportsPlex is a place to play pickleball in Kearney, NE. There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, locker rooms, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
